CustomField.description: Please enter daily or weekly comments, limited to 500 characters max. Note that comments here are not stored and will be overwritten by newer updates. To create a permanent record, please copy and paste your text into the "Chatter" section.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Please enter daily or weekly comments, limited to 500 characters max. Note that comments here are not stored and will be overwritten by newer updates. To create a permanent record, please copy and paste your text into the "Chatter" section
CustomField.label: Daily/Weekly Updates
